description: Bootstrap a new Living Software instance from this genome. Copies kernel schema, capabilities, and public surface. Does not copy state (kernel.db, .env). The spawned instance inherits the protocol algebra but starts a fresh ontology.

inputs.target: absolute path for the new instance directory
inputs.name: human-readable instance identifier

invariants: spawned instance has zero entity records
spawned instance has one instance_identity record
spawned instance has identical schema to parent
spawned instance has identical capabilities to parent
.env is not copied — operator must fill in
